title: 徐靖翔 Ching-Hsiang Hsu and 林家揚 Chia-Yang Lin complete master's thesis oral defenses
summary: Congratulations to 徐靖翔 Ching-Hsiang Hsu and 林家揚 Chia-Yang Lin, master’s students in the Precision and Automation Program, on successfully completing their master’s thesis oral defenses on May 13 and June 29, 2026, respectively.

title: 籃翊綸 Yi-Lun Lan presents oral paper at APCOT 2026
summary: 籃翊綸 Yi-Lun Lan presented the oral paper "Automated Adaptive Feature Extraction for Microfluidic Droplet Voiceprint Monitoring via Heuristic Optimization" at APCOT 2026 & ICSS 2026 in Taichung, Taiwan.
imageAlt: 籃翊綸 Yi-Lun Lan presenting an oral paper at APCOT 2026 & ICSS 2026

title: New IMLAB website draft started
summary: A maintainable GitHub Pages-ready website structure was created with editable data files.

title: NYCU ORCA AUV team reaches SAUVC 2026 finals
summary: CNA reported that the NYCU ORCA AUV student team, co-advised by Prof. Chia-Hung Tsai, advanced to the finals of the Singapore AUV Challenge and validated autonomous underwater navigation and sensing integration.

title: Microcapsule project period completed
summary: Public NYCU profile lists recent projects on controllable microcapsules toward artificial red blood cells.
